AuthBase.oidcGenericExplanation: Kolibri is an e-learning platform. You can also use your Kolibri account to log in to some third-party applications.
AuthBase.oidcSpecificExplanation: You were sent here from the application '{app_name}'. Kolibri is an e-learning platform, and you can also use your Kolibri account to access '{app_name}'.
AuthBase.restrictedAccess: Access to Kolibri has been restricted for external devices
AuthBase.restrictedAccessDescription: To change this, sign in as a super admin and update the Device network access settings
BirthYearSelect.birthYearTooltip: Provide an estimate if you are unsure.
CommonUserPageStrings.signInPrompt: Sign in if you have an existing account
DeviceUnusableStrings.deprovisioningErro: An error occurred while trying to reinstall Kolibri. Please try again.
DeviceUnusableStrings.noSuperuserCallToA: Please reinstall Kolibri to create a superuser account.
DeviceUnusableStrings.noSuperusersNotice: This device is unusable because there are no superuser accounts on this device.
DeviceUnusableStrings.superusersSoftDele: Please contact your system administrator to restore your account or reinstall Kolibri to create a new superuser account.
This device is unusable because all superuser accounts on this device have been deleted on the server.
DeviceUnusableStrings.unknownIssueNotice: This device is unusable due to an unknown reason. Please contact support.
FacilitySelect.askAdminForAccountLabel: Ask your administrator to create an account for these facilities:
FacilitySelect.canSignUpForFacilityLabel: Select the facility that you want to associate your new account with:
FacilitySelect.selectFacilityLabel: Select the facility that has your account
NewPasswordPage.needToMakeNewPasswordLab: Hi, {user}. You need to set a new password for your account.
PicturePasswordStrings.allIconsSelected: 3 icons already selected. To change an icon, uncheck it and select another.
PicturePasswordStrings.childFriendlyIcon: The child-friendly icons are designed for young learners. These icons use the same objects as the standard set, in a more colorful and engaging style.
PicturePasswordStrings.formAriaLabel: Select 3 pictures below to sign in to Kolibri
PicturePasswordStrings.iconSelectedAsFir: {icon} selected as first, select the second
PicturePasswordStrings.iconSelectedAsSec: {icon} selected as second, select the third
PicturePasswordStrings.iconSelectedAsThi: {icon} selected as third, confirm all 3 below
PicturePasswordStrings.learnerCreationDi: Learner creation is currently disabled due to reaching limit of 1300 learners.
PicturePasswordStrings.learnerLimitReach: This facility is using picture passwords, which are available only for facilities with fewer than 1300 learners.
You've reached this limit. To add more learners, change the learner sign-in method in Facility settings.
PicturePasswordStrings.learnersPictureSi: Learners will sign in by selecting a unique 3-picture code.
PicturePasswordStrings.noLearnersInClass: There are no learners in this class
PicturePasswordStrings.noPasswordSignInD: Learners can sign in with their username
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordAs: If you forget, your coach can help.
Remember these pictures and write them down if you need to. You will need them to sign in to Kolibri in the future.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordDe: Learners sign in by selecting a 3-picture sequence, with the option to use a username instead.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordFo: Password for {learnerName} is a list of {count} pictures: {labels}
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordIn: Learners sign in by selecting a 3-picture sequence unique to their account. Each sequence is auto-generated and assigned by Kolibri and cannot be changed. This feature is only available in facilities with fewer than 1,300 learners.
Picture password is designed for early-literacy learners.
Learners who join the facility after the 1,300 user limit can sign in with a username.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordUn: Picture passwords are only available for facilities with up to {learnerLimit} learners.
Picture password is not available right now.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordWi: Kolibri will automatically assign a picture password after the user is created.
SignInPage.requiredForCoachesAdmins: Password is required for coaches and admins
SignUpPage.demographicInfoExplanation: It will be visible to administrators. It will also be used to help improve the software and resources for different learner types and needs.
SignUpPage.privacyLinkText: Learn more about usage and privacy
TaskStrings.importSuccessStatus: The '{facilityName}' learning facility has been successfully loaded to this device
TaskStrings.taskLODFinishedByLabel: Account '{fullname}' from '{facilityname}' successfully loaded to this device
UserPageSnackbars.signedOut: You were automatically signed out due to inactivity
